textByHash.0cc42fb964a0bf4796a2d90066c3ec0b0fcb959e: Of course. I plan to assist the forces of Saradomin who will come to our aid, and fight against the legions of vampyres that infest this foul place. These brave mercenaries shall need a guide.
textByHash.a5f0f21708c643cca36affce430635b869122185: When a guide arrives, I will aid the mercenary by holding their wealth for their eventual return. The mercenary will repay the guide by giving him a token for items which I am holding.
textByHash.fe36f8421def3f1c4a57a0c84213ca2d8090a664: I shall give such items to the guide as payment for their services once I'm handed the token.
textByHash.11562802f22f5b57f2c2ff2ff8388daa30583487: Oh, the range of items is very varied. Mercenaries tend to hold raw materials in high esteem and so will deposit those with me. They also seem to be good bartering items.
textByHash.af87793bb8baec069fb05266532cbc87d55605b8: Generally, things like uncooked lobsters, coal, silver bars, bow strings. Things which are useful! Plus the odd tome of experience, which are considered incredibly useful.
textByHash.e682ffe8789856465eb6344fecd7cbd094eae7e6: When a guide arrives, I will aid the mercenary by holding their wealth for their eventual return. The mercenary will repay the guide by giving her a token for items which I am holding.
textByHash.c9bf2a0091fc3d6c0bd10072512d31816e64e70c: When a guide arrives, I will aid the mercenary by holding their wealth for their eventual return. The mercenary will repay the guide by giving them a token for items which I am holding.
textByHash.602558f1ffd81b7b5613a2fd84c326796f8ff9b1: Hello friend. What can I do for you?
textByHash.d6af8d0d5fea1bd790b6c34773a9f20dc161c337: No need, friend. You can do that yourself.
textByHash.7ab1e5747edea9658a7514913d96a5c36ffbb416: Hmmm, not really sure. They do look disgusting though..oh, actually, I remember some other adventurers taking some of these to Sanfew now...something about being able to make a potion with them.
textByHash.02d66265bf358934b526ee66469253a6f100aa9c: Maybe. It's worth a try. Next time you're in Taverley, pop in and ask him. I think I remember some adventurers saying something about a serum though, some sort of potion that can be made with them.
textByHash.b53852823fdcbca711073249da292d148adcae68: Of course. These mercenaries are here waiting for someone to take them down to Burgh de Rott. They want to do their bit against the vampyres.
textByHash.80cf7ee9389d8864be6e5e829d4b4256a34278e1: I hold some items for these good hearted souls so that the guide can be recompensed when the job is done.
textByHash.d6e3196570936195ac38630b6e6b7ef6b816e5f7: Maybe? It's worth a try. Next time you're in Taverley, pop in and ask him. I think I remember some adventurers saying something about a serum though, some sort of potion that can be made with them.
textByHash.20130bf24a23fd1e8f8fef735e446c119725f236: Oh well done! Thank you for aiding our citizens.
